# Registration for Activate Is Now Open - Iterable

## Registration for Activate Is Now Open

**Published by**

January 16, 2018

![Registration for Activate, Iterable's omni-channel marketing conference, is now open](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Activate_General_Facebook_L1R3-2.png)

Last week we previewed why you won’t want to miss Iterable’s debut conference, Activate, which takes place on April 3rd at the St. Regis hotel in San Francisco.

Today we’re announcing that registration for the event is now open, so make sure to reserve your spot!

We’re also excited to share a few of our key speakers, all of whom have exemplified modern marketing excellence:

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/01/ActivateSpeakers.png)

We’ll be announcing more speakers over the next several weeks, so stay tuned!

With early bird pricing now available, you’ll gain full access to the conference, including all keynotes, 15+ educational sessions and a networking happy hour. Iterable customers can also attend a half-day of technical workshops on April 2nd for an additional cost.

If you’ve been leveraging Iterable to power personalized, omni-channel relevance at scale, we want to recognize and celebrate your accomplishments at Activate. We’ll be presenting the Growth Marketing Awards in these five categories:

*   Growth marketing team of the year
*   Most captive audience
*   Best omni-channel campaign
*   Most impactful transition to Iterable
*   Most sophisticated use of Workflow Studio

The deadline to submit your award application is February 16th, so don’t delay! Click here to register for the event and apply for the Growth Marketing Awards.

Once registered, you’ll receive regular updates regarding the conference agenda, speakers, sessions and more. In the meantime, please email activate18@deviterable.wpengine.com with any questions. We appreciate your support and look forward to seeing you at Activate!
